---
title: "Ploughing and Sowing; or, Annals of an Evening School in a Yorkshire village, and the work that grew out of it"
---

## Ploughing and Sowing; or, Annals of an Evening School in a Yorkshire village, and the work that grew out of it

**Author:** Mary Emily Simpson
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** London and Derby: Mozley

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
